name: sulis-concierge
description: DEPRECATED — the concierge agent + journey skills moved to the `sulis` plugin (the canonical front-door) at v0.2.0. Run `claude --agent sulis` instead of `claude --agent sulis-concierge`; use `/sulis:start`, `/sulis:handoff`, `/sulis:status` in place of the old `/sulis-concierge:*` invocations. This plugin retained as a deprecation shim; remove it when convenient.
